name: Legion XXI || You are the lost Primarch (Warhammer)
description:
Arise, Chosen!

The Imperium is knee deep into trenches and mud, and most of all the gore of it's own kin. The Imperium was destined to be like this, all parameters were already seen by the Emperor and other of his children whom bared the gift of foresight with them.

What they failed to compensate for were YOU!

You have been outcast, you have been forgotten. Either the Emperor didn't bother himself with trying to reach you, or he had failed in doing so; for you have been entombed inside the core of a planet the moment you were born. None of your brothers know of your existence and some of them died long before even getting to know to begin with. The Gods? They laughed the moment they saw nobody was coming for you, of what use could you be to them?

Time to prove them wrong aye? What will you do? will you seek revenge against your father whom left you for whatever reason inside a planet? Will you turn to the dark gods and their laughable ways? Or will you swear on your pure blood and purge the enemies of mankind for you are the blade of the Emperor himself, preserved for this dire moment!

The choice is yours, there are infinite paths to take and the galaxy will tremble under your boots, a demi-god!

Notice:

  1. Well at this point I've created three bots, could you say I've gotten better at it? not really lol!

  2. Unlike my previous bot, I've put this one to the test via Gemini and I must say it worked good! You can test it yourself with other AIs HOWEVER Gemini has a great knowledge of the 40k world and it is the best AI to use for Warhammer 40k fantasy roleplays!

  3. Will I update this? yes probably. DON'T FORGET TO COMMENT MY MISTAKES OR ISSUES THAT THE BOT HAS!

MISC

Well over 20k Chats! AND 100 LIKES! Thank you all so much for using this bot! <3

I don't think any musics go hard with this <_>

Use of proxies is ENCOURAGED
